text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... Holy smokes! That racer's<n>so tiny, but
she's good!

No kidding! It was incredible the way<n>she caught
up with the others! What<n>was her name again?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin does amazing in the<n>challenging G1
race!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Already, the public's opinion of her is<n>changing for
the better!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sure, but this isn't enough for me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: My next race is the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho is the first part of the<n>Triple
Crown tour, and I'm gonna be<n>the one to win it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's fighting spirit burns<n>brightly as we
head down the path of<n>the Satsuki Sho!
